OUTDIR="/tmp/symbols"
cd "$OUTDIR"

# Download .NET 10.0.2 android-arm64 runtime package (just the .nupkg, it's a zip)
# Try to selectively extract just libcoreclr.so to check BuildId
for VER in 10.0.2 10.0.1 10.0.0; do
  NUPKG="microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64.${VER}.nupkg"
  URL="https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64/${VER}/${NUPKG}"
  echo "=== Trying $VER ==="
  
  # Download just enough to list contents, then extract libcoreclr.so
  curl -sS -L --fail -o "$NUPKG" "$URL" 2>&1
  if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    # List libcoreclr.so in the archive
    unzip -l "$NUPKG" 2>/dev/null | grep libcoreclr
    # Extract just libcoreclr.so
    unzip -o -j "$NUPKG" "runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" -d "${VER}" 2>/dev/null
    if [ -f "${VER}/libcoreclr.so" ]; then
      FOUND_BUILDID=$(readelf -n "${VER}/libcoreclr.so" 2>/dev/null | grep "Build ID" | awk '{print $3}')
      echo "  BuildId: $FOUND_BUILDID"
      if [ "$FOUND_BUILDID" = "4ca7e2f19b3d605847a1c8e3f5b7d9a2c4e6f801" ]; then
        echo "  *** MATCH FOUND! Version: $VER ***"
        break
      fi
    fi
    rm -f "$NUPKG"
  else
    echo "  Failed to download"
  fi
done

  NUPKG="microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64.${VER}.nupkg"
  URL="https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/microsoft.netcore.app.runtime.android-arm64/${VER}/${NUPKG}"
  echo -n "$VER: "
  
  curl -sS -L --fail -o "$NUPKG" "$URL" 2>&1
  if [ $? -eq 0 ]; then
    unzip -o -j "$NUPKG" "runtimes/android-arm64/native/libcoreclr.so" -d "v-${VER}" 2>/dev/null >/dev/null

      FOUND_BUILDID=$(readelf -n "v-${VER}/libcoreclr.so" 2>/dev/null | grep "Build ID" | awk '{print $3}')

      if [ "$FOUND_BUILDID" = "$TARGET" ]; then
        echo "*** MATCH FOUND! ***"
        break
      fi
    fi
    rm -f "$NUPKG"
  else
    echo "download failed"
  fi
done
